name: NRGene Technologies Ltd
summary: Energin .R Technologies 2009 LTD., a genomic big data company, provides computational tools to seed and food companies worldwide. It provides software and algorithms. The company offers cannabis and hemp, assemble, compare, genotype, predict, breed, and consortia solutions. Its tools are implemented by major agribiotech companies, as well as the research teams in academia. The company was founded in 2009 and is headquartered in Ness Ziona, Israel.
